Entering CLI Mode, type 'exit' to reboot, or 'help'

# 
# Building AutoComplete Cache ... Done!
# 
# diff

# version
# Betaflight / STM32H743 (H743) 2025.12.0-RC2 Nov  4 2025 / 02:03:32 (9c1a6bfab) MSP API: 1.47
# config rev: c940ae8

# start the command batch
batch start

board_name MICOAIR743
manufacturer_id MICO

# resources
resource MOTOR 2 E11
resource MOTOR 3 NONE
resource MOTOR 4 NONE
resource MOTOR 5 NONE
resource MOTOR 6 NONE
resource MOTOR 7 NONE
resource MOTOR 8 NONE
resource SERVO 1 B01
resource SERVO 2 B00
resource SERVO 3 D12
resource SERVO 4 D13
resource LED_STRIP 1 NONE

# feature
feature LED_STRIP
feature OSD

# serial
serial UART2 0 115200 57600 0 115200
serial UART8 131073 115200 57600 0 115200

# mixer
mixer CUSTOMAIRPLANE
mmix 0  1.000  0.000  0.000  0.300
mmix 1  1.000  0.000  0.000 -0.300

# servo
servo 2 1000 2000 1500 -100 -1
servo 3 1000 2000 1500 -100 -1

# servo mixer
smix 0 2 0 100 0 0 100 0
smix 1 3 0 100 0 0 100 0
smix 2 4 1 100 0 0 100 0
smix 3 5 2 100 0 0 100 0

# map
map TAER1234

# aux
aux 0 0 0 1700 2100 0 0
aux 1 1 1 1300 1700 0 0
aux 2 12 1 1700 2100 0 0
aux 3 13 5 1700 2100 0 0

# rxrange
rxrange 0 989 2010
rxrange 1 989 2012
rxrange 2 989 2012
rxrange 3 995 2012

# master
set dyn_notch_count = 1
set dyn_notch_q = 500
set acc_calibration = 152,201,32,1
set mag_hardware = NONE
set rc_smoothing_auto_factor = 140
set rc_smoothing_setpoint_cutoff = 25
set motor_idle = 500
set dshot_bidir = ON
set motor_poles = 12
set align_board_pitch = -12
set align_board_yaw = 225
set vbat_max_cell_voltage = 440
set vbat_min_cell_voltage = 320
set vbat_warning_cell_voltage = 340
set servo_pwm_rate = 333
set small_angle = 180
set deadband = 5
set yaw_deadband = 5
set spa_roll_mode = PD_I_FREEZE
set spa_pitch_mode = PD_I_FREEZE
set spa_yaw_mode = PD_I_FREEZE
set yaw_type = DIFF_THRUST
set report_cell_voltage = ON
set osd_flymode_pos = 2083
set osd_throttle_pos = 2533
set osd_warnings_pos = 14867
set osd_avg_cell_voltage_pos = 2564
set osd_battery_usage_pos = 33109
set debug_mode = FFT_FREQ

profile 0

# profile 0
set dterm_lpf1_dyn_min_hz = 60
set dterm_lpf1_dyn_max_hz = 120
set dterm_lpf1_static_hz = 60
set dterm_lpf2_static_hz = 120
set anti_gravity_gain = 0
set iterm_relax_cutoff = 5
set throttle_boost = 0
set p_pitch = 35
set i_pitch = 50
set d_pitch = 15
set p_roll = 30
set i_roll = 45
set d_roll = 12
set p_yaw = 30
set i_yaw = 0
set s_pitch = 50
set s_roll = 50
set angle_earth_ref = 0
set d_max_roll = 0
set d_max_pitch = 0
set feedforward_smooth_factor = 45
set feedforward_jitter_factor = 10
set simplified_pids_mode = OFF
set simplified_dterm_filter_multiplier = 80
set tpa_mode = PD
set tpa_speed_basic_delay = 1500
set tpa_speed_max_voltage = 1260
set tpa_curve_type = HYPERBOLIC
set tpa_curve_stall_throttle = 10
set tpa_curve_pid_thr0 = 105
set tpa_curve_pid_thr100 = 60
set tpa_curve_expo = 45
set spa_roll_center = 200
set spa_roll_width = 70
set spa_pitch_center = 150
set spa_pitch_width = 70
set spa_yaw_center = 150
set spa_yaw_width = 70

rateprofile 0

# rateprofile 0
set roll_expo = 35
set pitch_expo = 30
set roll_srate = 50
set pitch_srate = 25
set yaw_srate = 15

# end the command batch
batch end
